basic_details.job_title: Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC (Delhi NCL), 5 years for SC/ST

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Diploma or Post-Doctoral Degree (or equivalent) in concerned specialty from NMC/MCI recognized institute with DMC registration, MBBS with 2 years experience in same specialty (if PG candidates unavailable)
qualification.details: MBBS with Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Diploma or Post-Doctoral Degree (or equivalent) in the concerned specialty from an NMC/MCI recognized University/Institute and must possess DMC registration. Alternatively, MBBS with 2 years of experience in the same specialty if a Post Graduate candidate is unavailable.

content_sections.heading: Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS with Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Diploma or Post-Doctoral Degree (or equivalent) in the concerned specialty from an NMC/MCI recognized University/Institute and must possess DMC registration. Alternatively, MBBS with 2 years of experience in the same specialty if a Post Graduate candidate is unavailable.

content_sections.heading: Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC (Delhi NCL), 5 years for SC/ST

content_sections.heading: Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Salary
Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident post at Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital is scheduled for 08 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Senior Resident post at Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident post is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Resident position ranges from Rs. 67,700 to Rs. 2,008,700 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an MBBS with a Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Diploma or Post-Doctoral Degree in the concerned specialty from an NMC/MCI recognized institute with DMC registration. Alternatively, MBBS with 2 years of experience in the same specialty is accepted if PG candidates are unavailable.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident post at Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Senior Resident position is Ad-hoc.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital located?
faq.answer: Lal Bahadur Shastri Hospital is located in Delhi, with the pincode 110091.
